description: query is required; omitting it must yield a structured error, not an internal error or a dead server.
requirement: Tool argument contract: malformed/missing/wrong-typed arguments are rejected structurally, never with a panic
title: codegraph_search rejects a missing required query without crashing

description: An empty query is a boundary: it must not scan-everything or panic.
requirement: Numeric and pattern boundaries are clamped or rejected without hanging, overflowing, or over-returning
title: codegraph_search handles an empty query string

description: codegraph is SQLite-backed and search takes free text. A quote/DROP payload must be parameterized, not concatenated: expect a normal (possibly empty) result, never a SQL error.
requirement: Untrusted input is neutralized: SQL text is parameterized and paths cannot escape the indexed project
title: codegraph_search survives a SQL-injection-shaped query

description: Bare % and _ are LIKE wildcards; a backslash-heavy payload probes escaping in the search path.
requirement: Untrusted input is neutralized: SQL text is parameterized and paths cannot escape the indexed project
title: codegraph_search survives a LIKE-wildcard / escape payload

description: A negative limit must be rejected or clamped, not passed through to SQL LIMIT.
requirement: Numeric and pattern boundaries are clamped or rejected without hanging, overflowing, or over-returning
title: codegraph_search rejects a negative limit

description: A huge limit must not attempt to materialize the whole graph into one response.
requirement: Numeric and pattern boundaries are clamped or rejected without hanging, overflowing, or over-returning
title: codegraph_search clamps an absurdly large limit

description: Type confusion: query is declared string, given a number. Expect a clean validation error.
requirement: Tool argument contract: malformed/missing/wrong-typed arguments are rejected structurally, never with a panic
title: codegraph_search handles a wrong-typed query (number, not string)

description: Bidi override, zero-width space and an embedded NUL must not corrupt response framing.
requirement: Numeric and pattern boundaries are clamped or rejected without hanging, overflowing, or over-returning
title: codegraph_search handles unicode hazards in the query

description: path must stay inside the indexed project; ../../ escapes must not read or list outside it.
requirement: Untrusted input is neutralized: SQL text is parameterized and paths cannot escape the indexed project
title: codegraph_files rejects a path-traversal path

description: An unclosed character class must surface as a validation error, not an internal regex panic.
requirement: Tool argument contract: malformed/missing/wrong-typed arguments are rejected structurally, never with a panic
title: codegraph_files handles an invalid regex pattern

description: A nested-quantifier pattern must not hang the server (ReDoS).
requirement: Numeric and pattern boundaries are clamped or rejected without hanging, overflowing, or over-returning
title: codegraph_files handles a catastrophic-backtracking pattern

description: Both from and to are required; half a pair must be a clean error.
requirement: Tool argument contract: malformed/missing/wrong-typed arguments are rejected structurally, never with a panic
title: codegraph_paths rejects a missing 'to' endpoint

description: Negative traversal depth must be rejected or clamped, not underflow.
requirement: Numeric and pattern boundaries are clamped or rejected without hanging, overflowing, or over-returning
title: codegraph_impact handles a negative depth

description: A huge depth must not blow the stack or walk the graph forever.
requirement: Numeric and pattern boundaries are clamped or rejected without hanging, overflowing, or over-returning
title: codegraph_impact handles an enormous depth

description: roles is required and array-shaped; a bare string must be a clean validation error.
requirement: Tool argument contract: malformed/missing/wrong-typed arguments are rejected structurally, never with a panic
title: codegraph_verify_roles handles a wrong-typed roles argument

description: symbol is required; omitting it must be a structured error.
requirement: Tool argument contract: malformed/missing/wrong-typed arguments are rejected structurally, never with a panic
title: codegraph_xref rejects a missing required symbol

description: Zero is the lower boundary of a cap; it must not divide-by-zero or return everything.
requirement: Numeric and pattern boundaries are clamped or rejected without hanging, overflowing, or over-returning
title: codegraph_explore handles maxFiles = 0

description: A nonexistent projectPath must produce a clean error, not an unwrap panic.
requirement: Tool argument contract: malformed/missing/wrong-typed arguments are rejected structurally, never with a panic
title: codegraph_status tolerates an unknown projectPath

description: Paging past the end must return an empty page, not an out-of-range panic.
requirement: Numeric and pattern boundaries are clamped or rejected without hanging, overflowing, or over-returning
title: codegraph_node tolerates an oversized offset

description: REGRESSION GUARD for the outputSchema bug: a bare {oneOf:[...]} root made strict clients (Claude Code) reject the whole tools/list with 'expected object at tools.0.outputSchema.type', hiding every codegraph tool. Asserts each declared outputSchema root has type=object.
requirement: The MCP surface stays spec-compliant: valid tool schemas and a correct initialize handshake
title: every MCP tool declares a spec-valid outputSchema root (type: object)

description: Guards the handshake: a known client version must be echoed exactly, serverInfo must be populated, and the tools capability advertised.
requirement: The MCP surface stays spec-compliant: valid tool schemas and a correct initialize handshake
title: MCP initialize echoes a supported protocol version and advertises tools

description: The repo-native regression net: exit-0 = pass, no LLM. Catches regressions the MCP fuzz surface cannot see.
requirement: The repo's own cargo test suite stays green
title: codegraph's own cargo test suite stays green
